message:
fix(runtime): Fail fast on itertools catch continue patterns

Fixed silent item skipping in itertools operations using 'catch continue':

- compress() - was silently skipping items on OOM
- pairwise() - was silently skipping pairs on OOM
- accumulate() - was silently skipping accumulated values on OOM
- groupby() - was silently skipping items in groups on OOM
- batched() - was silently skipping batches and items on OOM
- islice() - was silently skipping items on OOM
- product() - was silently skipping product pairs on OOM

All changed from 'catch continue' to 'catch unreachable' to fail loudly
instead of returning incomplete/incorrect results.
